headline: Crown Castle (CCI) Stock After Fiber Exit And Buyback Reset How Fair Is The New Tower Valuation
summary: Crown Castle (CCI) has just completed the sale of its fiber and small cell businesses, pairing the move with a US$1.0b buyback and a multibillion dollar debt reduction plan. See our latest analysis for Crown Castle. Despite a long run of weak sentiment and a 1 year total shareholder return that declined 2.96%, Crown Castle’s 30 day share price return of 2.83% and 90 day gain of 5.36% suggest momentum is beginning to rebuild around the completed fiber and small cell exit and balance sheet...
